pre_game.message: Hey, I'm H. It's a bit intense being in here with everyone, isn't it? What's your plan if you walk away with the prize?
Nice to meet you, H. I'm A. It's definitely a lot to take in. Honestly, I just want to take care of my family and make sure we're set for a while. What's your story?
Same here, honestly. I'm just trying to look out for the people I love and get us some stability; this money would change everything. Have you heard much about how the game actually works?
Not much, just that there's a shared pool we'll be drawing from. I'm hoping it's straightforward, as I'm really just focused on making sure I don't walk away empty-handed.
I hear that. Since it's a shared pool, maybe if we look out for each other, we can make sure nobody leaves with nothing.
I'm definitely open to that. It makes more sense to look out for each other so we all walk away with something.
Glad to hear it. I think if we stay smart and keep each other in the loop, we'll all be much better off when the game starts.
Definitely. It’s better to have each other's backs in a room full of strangers.
Exactly. I'm glad we're on the same page—let's keep an eye out for each other once things get moving.
For sure. Let's keep our heads clear and stick to the plan. I'll see you out there.
Sounds good, A. Let's keep our eyes on the prize and stick together. See you in there.
